name: Fresh Apple Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
Beat eggs in a mixing bowl. Add oil and sugar; beat well.
Add remaining ingredients, except icing; blend thoroughly.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until cake begins to pull away from sides of pan.
Cool in pan on a wire rack.
Spread with Cream Cheese Icing.
Cream Cheese Icing:
2 packages (3 ounces each) cream cheese, softened
1/4 cup (1/2 stick) butter or margarine, softened
4 cups sifted confectioners' sugar (about 1 pound)
2 teaspoons vanilla
Beat cream cheese and butter together until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in sugar until smooth. Add vanilla and blend thoroughly.
